category.scope_note: Household refrigerator comparison for China-export products entering Laos, covering DOSM conformity, MEM energy policy, EDL grid fit, refrigerant documentation, EMC, safety, and importer records.

target_market_label.zh: 老挝（DOSM / 能源矿产部 / EDL）
target_market_label.zht: 寮國（DOSM / 能源礦產部 / EDL）

title.en: China-to-Laos Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入老挝：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入寮國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Informational comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance against Laos DOSM regulated-goods conformity, MEM energy-programme expectations, EDL 230 V / 50 Hz grid fit, IEC/ASEAN standards adoption, R-600a documentation, and importer records.
description.zh: 中国家用电冰箱合规与老挝DOSM受规管货物合格评定、能源矿产部能效计划预期、EDL 230 V / 50 Hz电网适配、IEC/东盟标准采标、R-600a文件及进口商资料的信息性对照。
description.zht: 中國家用電冰箱合規與寮國DOSM受規管貨物合格評定、能源礦產部能效計劃預期、EDL 230 V / 50 Hz電網適配、IEC/東盟標準採標、R-600a文件及進口商資料的資訊性對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, grid-connection approval, or Laos market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current DOSM regulated-goods lists, MEM energy-programme rules, EDL supply conditions, and importer documentation with qualified local professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、电网接入批准或老挝市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格本地专业人士核验现行DOSM受规管货物清单、能源矿产部能效计划规则、EDL供电条件及进口商文件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、電網接入批准或寮國市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格本地專業人士核驗現行DOSM受規管貨物清單、能源礦產部能效計劃規則、EDL供電條件及進口商文件。

answer_first.en: For Laos, a China-export refrigerator should be treated as a regulated electrical product requiring local DOSM conformity confirmation through the importer, IEC 60335-2-24 safety evidence, MEM energy-programme checks, and EDL grid-fit review for 230 V / 50 Hz. China’s 50 Hz design is helpful, but the nominal voltage differs from China’s 220/380 V system. Laos has no broad horizontal RoHS regime in force, so RoHS-style EU paperwork should not be presented as a Laos market-access requirement unless a specific tender or buyer contract asks for it.
answer_first.zh: 面向老挝，中国出口冰箱应按受规管电气产品处理，由进口商确认DOSM合格路径，准备IEC 60335-2-24安全证据，核查能源矿产部能效计划，并按EDL 230 V / 50 Hz供电复核电网适配。中国50 Hz设计有利，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V系统。老挝目前没有在施的横向RoHS制度，因此不应把欧盟式RoHS文件表述为老挝市场准入要求，除非特定招标或买方合同另有要求。
answer_first.zht: 面向寮國，中國出口冰箱應按受規管電氣產品處理，由進口商確認DOSM合格路徑，準備IEC 60335-2-24安全證據，核查能源礦產部能效計劃，並按EDL 230 V / 50 Hz供電複核電網適配。中國50 Hz設計有利，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V系統。寮國目前沒有在施的橫向RoHS制度，因此不應把歐盟式RoHS文件表述為寮國市場准入要求，除非特定招標或買方合同另有要求。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update only from official Laos regulator, standards, utility, customs, ASEAN, IEC, or primary programme sources; keep verified false until human review confirms the source chain.
